mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.target_type, r.target_id, r.user_id, u.login_id, r.content, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM reply r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.target_type = #{targetType} AND r.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply (target_type, target_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reply WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.target_type AS target_type, r.target_id AS target_id, r.user_id AS userId, u.login_id AS loginId, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reply r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
